golden_skus.description: Hero SKU — all 7 gates expected to pass. Used for Phase 1.1 validation.
Kill-tier SKU — all content fields blocked. Used for Phase 1.3 kill scenario.
Harvest-tier SKU — G1, G2, G6 checked only; G4/G5/G7 suspended. Used for Phase 1.3 harvest scenario.
